description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle in autonomy was proceeding straight on Kearney Street in San Francisco, CA, in stop-and-go traffic. The Zoox vehicle 
came to a stop for a vehicle ahead when Vehicle Two made light contact with the Zoox vehicle's rear bumper from behind. There were no 
injuries and the police were not called. 
Print
Clear Form
